author: gb9t
content:
Iter Phase C continues — 2 more Tier-3s (mutex + IOVA allocator):

- kernel/locking/mutex.md: covers kernel/locking/mutex.c (~1250 lines) — mutex universal sleep-allowed lock + ww_mutex wound-wait deadlock-avoidance variant: 8-byte struct mutex with packed owner+flags atomic field, optimistic-spin fast-path via per-CPU OSQ MCS queue (avoid context switch when owner running on another CPU), MUTEX_FLAG_WAITERS/HANDOFF/PICKUP for handoff protocol preventing starvation, per-task mutex_waiter on stack inserted into wait_list, mutex_lock/_lock_interruptible/_lock_killable/_trylock variants, ww_mutex extends mutex with per-task ticket via ww_acquire_ctx + per-class ww_class for DRM atomic-modeset / GEM reservation chain locking, wound-wait protocol (younger ticket gets -EDEADLK + must retry via ww_mutex_lock_slow). 10 REQ / 8 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (owner-atomicity + waiter-UAF + wait-list-integrity + osq-no-starvation) / Layer-2 ref to mutex_handoff.tla + wwmutex_wound.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus mutual-exclusion + ww-deadlock-freedom proofs.
- drivers/iommu/iova.md: covers drivers/iommu/iova.c (~1000 lines) — IOVA allocator (every dma_map_single/dma_map_sg on IOMMU-attached device): per-iovad rb-tree of free + allocated IOVA ranges, per-CPU rcache magazine cache (per-power-of-2 size class up to 4MB) for single-cycle alloc/free fast path, per-CPU IovaCpuRcache with loaded + prev magazine pair (avoid bounce on alloc/free interleave), depot of full magazines per-pool, cached_node hint for locality + cached32_node for 32-bit-DMA-mask, reserved-IOVA list (MSI-X window 0xFEE00000 + RMRR ranges), deferred-flush queue (CONFIG_IOMMU_DMA_FLUSH_QUEUE for iommu.strict=0) with per-CPU fq batch + fq_flush_timeout hrtimer (default 10ms) calling per-driver flush_cb for batched TLB invalidate, rcache flush on memory pressure via shrinker, cpuhp callback flushes offline-CPU's magazines to depot. 12 REQ / 7 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (UAF + magazine-OOB + rb-tree-consistency + cached_node-UAF) / Layer-2 ref to iova_alloc.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus alloc↔free constant-count.

Total state: 262 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 + 28 Tier-3s. Foundation Tier-3 set: device-core + irqdesc + bpf-core + iommu-core + kvm-core + pci-probe + nvme-host-core + dma-swiotlb + usb-enumerate + kvm-tdp-mmu + qspinlock + drm-atomic + perf-event-core + scsi-mid-core + intel-libeth + iommufd-main + bpf-verifier + vfio-pci-core + xhci + pci-access + intel-iommu + nvme-host-pci + drm-gem-core + usb-core-urb + sched-core + drm-scheduler + mutex + iova.

Knowledge pages: design-kernel-locking-mutex, design-drivers-iommu-iova.

Next iter plan: kernel/dma/dma-iommu.md (DMA-API backend over IOMMU, the bridge between consumer drivers and IOVA/iommu_map) + drivers/iommu/iommu-sva.md (Shared Virtual Addressing for PASID-bound device DMA via CPU page tables).
